---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Fit with the project

Notionless is local-first, zero-account, and pure-P2P (no server holding your
data). Does this fit that model? If it implies a server-side component, explain
how it stays compatible.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or anything else that helps.
